issue.message: Lint found an issue registry (`androidx.compose.foundation.lint.FoundationIssueRegistry`) which requires a newer API level. That means that the custom lint checks are intended for a newer lint version; please upgrade.

Lint found an issue registry (`androidx.compose.runtime.lint.RuntimeIssueRegistry`) which requires a newer API level. That means that the custom lint checks are intended for a newer lint version; please upgrade.

Lint found an issue registry (`androidx.compose.ui.lint.UiIssueRegistry`) which requires a newer API level. That means that the custom lint checks are intended for a newer lint version; please upgrade.

Lint found an issue registry (`androidx.lifecycle.lint.LiveDataCoreIssueRegistry`) which requires a newer API level. That means that the custom lint checks are intended for a newer lint version; please upgrade.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Formatting %d followed by words ("recompositions"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Replace straight quotes (") with directional quotes (“”, “ and ”) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="recomposition_empty_subtitle">Add Modifier.trackRecomposition(\"name\") to composables you want to monitor.</string>
